title: ROADMAP
content:
UNIT I – Introduction & Applications of Deep Learning

Dekhni chahiye

  1. L2: Brief history of deep learning

  2. L1: The deep revival | from cats to convnet

  3. L3: Faster-higher-stronger | rise of deep learning

Optional (applications understanding ke liye)

  1. L4: Call for sanity in artificial intelligence

  2. L5: Madness and the rise of transformers

Ye videos cover karengi:

  • Deep learning definition

  • History

  • Why DL became popular

  • Applications: CV, NLP, Speech

UNIT II – Artificial Neural Networks

1️⃣ Biological neuron & basic idea

Dekho:

  1. L6: Motivation from biological neuron

2️⃣ McCulloch Pitts & Threshold logic

  1. McCulloch Pitts Neuron and Thresholding Logic

3️⃣ Perceptron

  1. L9: Perceptrons: from McCulloch Pitts to weighted inputs

  2. L7: Errors & error surfaces | perceptron learning

  3. L8: Perceptron learning algorithm

4️⃣ Linear separability & convergence theorem

  1. L16: Linearly separable functions | limitations of perceptron

  2. L12: Proof of convergence: perceptron learning algorithm

5️⃣ Feed Forward Networks / MLP

  1. L11: Representation power of a network of perceptrons | MLPs

6️⃣ Supervised learning & loss

  1. L13: A typical supervised machine learning setup

7️⃣ Gradient Descent

  1. L14: Learning parameters | loss & error surface

  2. L15: Gradient descent | weight update rule

8️⃣ Backpropagation

  1. L25: Feed forward neural networks explained | backprop intuition

  2. L24: Backpropagation intuition

9️⃣ Backprop mathematics (exam ke liye important)

  1. L26: Gradient w.r.t output units

  2. L27: Gradient w.r.t parameters

  3. L28: Gradient w.r.t hidden units

  4. L29: Backprop pseudocode

🔟 Empirical Risk Minimization & Generalization

  1. L45: Introduction to bias & variance

  2. L43: Training error vs test error

1️⃣1️⃣ Regularization

  1. L46: L2 regularization

  2. L53: Early stopping

Optional:

  • L57 Dropout

  • L50 Data augmentation

❌ Jo videos tum skip kar sakte ho

Abhi syllabus ke hisaab se zaroori nahi:

  • Momentum / Adam / RMSProp optimizers

  • Transformer architecture

  • CNN

  • Advanced activation functions

  • Karnaugh maps

Ye sab extra deep learning topics hain.

📊 Final Count

Tumhe approx 26–28 videos dekhni hain instead of 68.

Total watch time approx:

~10–12 hours

🔥 Best Strategy (Exam Focused)

Step-wise dekho:

1️⃣ History (3 videos)
2️⃣ McCulloch + Perceptron (5 videos)
3️⃣ MLP + Gradient Descent (4 videos)
4️⃣ Backpropagation (6 videos)
5️⃣ Bias-Variance + Regularization (4 videos)

✅ Agar chaho toh main tumhare liye:

  • Exam oriented notes

  • Important formulas

  • Backprop derivation shortcut

  • Most asked questions

bhi bana sakta hoon jo DL exam me 70-80% questions cover kar dete hain.
